A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent extracted business categories from the description field using a brittle regex in execute_python (call var_function-call-8332062112186191048) that only matched phrases like "services in", missing other category patterns (e.g., "including"), which led to miscounting categories, selecting "Education" from a single business, and computing its average rating instead of correctly identifying "Restaurant".
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no

FM4: yes
